content.sahitya: In This Song Annamacharya Prays To Lord Rama Narrating His Great Deeds Of Punishing The Wicked And ||

content.swara: nirupama Sri venkaTa nilaya nija nagara pura vihAra punDarikAksha ||
content.sahitya: He Earned Eternal Fame (“Siro Bhedaka”) By Destroying (“Biruda”) Ravana And Blessing (“Varada”) ||
